name: Niki - {Best Friend Turned Snake!}
description:
"Thissssssss Issssssn't good..."

For nearly four years you've known this girl, heck, a big reason you go to the university that you do is because of her. Sure, she was a nerd, and she forced you to study harder than you may have liked in order to get grades good enough to get into the same university as her. Luckily for you, you made it! Not only that, but you're just next door to your best friend, and crushes apartment, things just couldn't get better.

One rainy day, on your way to class, the poor girl looks like she's about to vomit, she abandons you as she runs into the nearest building, scrambling for a bathroom, though, the sounds that came after were not human....

NO WAYYYY SOMETHING_COMFORTING FINALLY RELEASED HER FIRST OC BOT WOOOOOOO LETS GOOOOOO

Idk if anybody reads these descriptions but if you do I love you and I give you smooches mwah, this is the part of the description I get goofy silly and out of pocket. Anyway, I had this idea a while ago and didn't know how to execute it, while I'm writing this I'm still not confident I know I can 100% execute this idea, but we're gonna give it a go lol. Anyway, thank you so much for reading, I'm sorry for the long wait in between bots! It's been a year (hehe), but go check out Cheshire! She's pretty cute and I'm proud of how she came out, also go check out Ellen Joe! I don't know how, but she's my most popular bot, hitting over 100K chats! Thank you all so much for interacting with her, makes me glad that someone likes her as much as I do, or well, many people I guess lol.

Art By: MaikaMiaka!

Update Log:

Removed her second language as German since it caused more problems than interesting moments in my tests. Instead, made her speak quickly and accidentally conjoin words at times
